subcodes.first_line: O Iskandar! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness. The world hath been encompassed by the dark smoke of ignorance and heedlessness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسکندر علیک بهائی و عنایتی عالم را دخان تیره جهل و نادانی احاطه نموده جمیع
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @apocalyptic imagery, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
